title: 数据库设计与Prisma ORM搭建

findings.title: creditScore 无范围验证
findings.description: Agent.creditScore 字段无约束，允许存入 -1、101 等无效值
findings.evidence: 探针测试接受 creditScore: -1 和 creditScore: 101 均成功插入数据库
findings.recommendation: 通过 migration SQL 添加 CHECK 约束 (credit_score >= 0 AND credit_score <= 100)
findings.arbitration: adopted — 降级为 warning。Prisma 不支持 schema 层范围约束，需用 CHECK。Disposition: fix_inline

fix.action: ADD CONSTRAINT agents_credit_score_check CHECK (credit_score >= 0 AND credit_score <= 100)

findings.title: Match.score 无范围验证
findings.description: Match.score Decimal(5,2) 无边界约束，允许存入负数
findings.evidence: 探针测试接受 score: -1 成功插入
findings.recommendation: 通过 migration SQL 添加 CHECK 约束 (score >= 0 AND score <= 100)
findings.arbitration: adopted — 降级为 warning。同 NP-PT-001，Prisma 限制。Disposition: fix_inline

fix.action: ADD CONSTRAINT matches_score_check CHECK (score >= 0 AND score <= 100)

findings.title: seed.ts 字符串字面量 senderType
findings.description: seed.ts 使用 senderType: 'USER'/'AGENT' 而非 SenderType 枚举
findings.evidence: seed.ts 第 328/338/349 行使用字符串字面量
findings.recommendation: 导入 SenderType 枚举使用
findings.arbitration: adopted — 降级为 info。Prisma SenderType.USER === 'USER'，功能等价但缺少类型安全。Disposition: fix_inline

fix.action: 导入 SenderType 枚举，将 senderType: 'USER'/'AGENT' 替换为 SenderType.USER/AGENT (3处)

findings.title: seed.ts Promise.all 无事务包装
findings.description: seed.ts 7 处 Promise.all 批量创建无原子性
findings.arbitration: dismissed — seed 脚本是开发工具，运行在空库上，有顶层 catch。过度解读。

findings.title: Prisma Client/DB Schema 不同步
findings.description: RoomParticipant 表缺少 added_by 列
findings.arbitration: dismissed — RoomParticipant 模型由后续 Issue 添加，超出 F002 范围。

findings.title: AgentFactory 缺少 creditScore 字段
findings.description: AgentFactoryData 接口和 createAgent 函数缺少 creditScore
findings.recommendation: 添加 creditScore?: number 到接口
findings.arbitration: adopted — 真实缺失，影响测试质量。Disposition: fix_inline

fix.action: AgentFactoryData 接口添加 creditScore?: number，createAgent 添加 creditScore: data.creditScore ?? 75

findings.title: seed.ts Demand/Supply status 字符串字面量
findings.description: seed.ts 使用 status: 'OPEN'/'AVAILABLE' 而非枚举
findings.arbitration: dismissed — 与 NP-PT-003 相同模式，Prisma 枚举值即字符串。重复。

severity_changes: NP-PT-001: critical → warning (Prisma 无 schema 层约束)

conclusion: findings_minor — 所有 adopted findings 已修复为 resolved。
